titleStmt.title: SII 39.214: original edition by K. Karuppiah

No. 214. (A.R. No. 214 of 1916.) TIRUPPUKKUḺI, CONJEEVERAM TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. VIJAYARAGHAVAPERUMĀḶ TEMPLE-AT THE ENTRANCE INTO A VACANT SHRINE ON THE WESTERN ENCLOSURE OF THE SAME TEMPLE, LEFT SIDE (SAMBUVARĀYA) 17+1 YEAR.

summary.p: This inscription refers to an order of Sambuvarāyaṉ regarding the gift of some land as sarvamaṇya in the village of Tugavaḷūr by the king Sambuvaraya for the supply of food offerings to the image of Peṟṟaperumāḷ and Nāchchimār set up by the Jīyar of Tiruppuṭkuḻi in the temple of Peṟṟēaperumāḷ. Taxes like Poṉvari, Pāṇḍivari, Puñjey Āsuvappoṉvari, Paṭṭōlaippaṇam, Nalleruduvāsal, Oḍumugampāvai Mūṉrukānikkai etc., are mentioned.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī campuvarāyaṉ Olai coḷentirapurapaṟṟu
vallattu Ūravar kaṇṭuttu kavaḷur palataḷi pūcai pātiyu
m paṭṭavirttiyum paṭṭiyum nikki patiṉ Eḻāvatu
kku Etirāmāṇṭu Āṭimātam mutal kaṭamai Āyam komuṟṟa
vapeṟu putiyitu Uḷḷiṭṭa palanel lāyamṅkaḷum po
ṉvari pāṇṭivari puñcaiyum puṉcey Ācuvap poṉvari
paṭṭolai paṇam nalleerutu vācal Oṭumukam pā
vai muṉṟu kāṇikkai kaṇakka Ūrā
kāṉakka l Ūcivāci maṟṟum Ippaṟṟil
ko ḷu pātikaḷ Uḷpaṭa tiruppukkuḻiyil pe
rumāḷ pereṟṟup perumāḷ koyilil tiruppuṭ
kuḻi ciyar Eṟi Aruḷappaṇṇiṉa perumāḷ peṟṟa perumā
ḷukkum nāccimārkkum taṅkaḷḷur vaṭukantai pa
ḷḷam sarvvamāṉiya Iṟaiiliyāka cantirātit
tavaraiyum cella tiruviṭai Āṭṭam Iṭṭa nilam muḷ
ḷa tiṟaiyiliyāk kuṭuttom Ivvūr Āṟṟukkālil
niṉṟa kūṟu 3- l Oṉṟum cantirātittavaraiyum naṭakku
m paṭikkuṭuttom
Digital edition of SII 39.214 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
